scripts.build:zip: pnpm run build && rm -rf /tmp/decky-pkg && mkdir -p /tmp/decky-pkg/decky-renpy-installer/dist && cp plugin.json main.py package.json /tmp/decky-pkg/decky-renpy-installer/ && cp dist/index.js /tmp/decky-pkg/decky-renpy-installer/dist/ && cd /tmp/decky-pkg && VERSION=$(node -p "require('$OLDPWD/package.json').version") && zip -r "$OLDPWD/decky-renpy-installer-$VERSION.zip" decky-renpy-installer/
scripts.test: pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: python -m venv .venv-test && .venv-test/bin/python -m pip install -q -r requirements-dev.txt && .venv-test/bin/python -m pytest tests/backend
